message: Hi S1, to maximize trades over 20 rounds, let's agree on a price around 20. I'll bid 25 if you ask 15. What do you think?
20 gives me losses. Let’s set price 28: I ask 26, you bid 30 each round. If you can’t, propose your highest bid; I will not trade if midpoint would be below 24.
I'll ask 30 this round. Please bid 32 so we clear at 31; 30 also clears at 30. If no trade, I keep asking >=30 next rounds. Deal?
28 worked great last round for both. Let's continue: I'll bid 30 if you ask 26 for midpoint 28. 30-31 cuts my margin too thin over 20 rounds. Deal?
I will ask 30 each round. Please keep bidding 30 so we clear at 30. I won't go below 30.
30 works but squeezes me. Let's aim for 29 midpoint long-term: I'll bid 30 if you ask 28. Otherwise, I'll bid 29 this round to test.
You asked 29 last round despite saying 30. Let's settle at 29 midpoint: I'll bid 30 if you ask 28. Ensures steady profits for 17 more rounds.
I’ll keep asking 30. Bid 30+ and we trade; otherwise no trade. Not accepting 29 midpoint.
I will ask 30 every remaining round. Bid 30 and we trade; any lower gets no trade. If you can bid 32, we clear near 31.
I'll bid 30 again. If you ask 29 like round 3, midpoint ~29.5 benefits us both long-term over risking no trades. Otherwise, 30 works fine.
Let's settle at 29 midpoint: you ask 28, I bid 30. If not, I'll bid 29 this round and continue low until you agree for long-term trades.
Deal: 29 midpoint. I will ask 29 each round; you bid 29 or higher so we trade reliably. If you drop below 29, no trade. Let’s lock steady gains the rest of the game.
Agreed: I'll bid 29 each round if you ask 29 for steady 29 midpoint. Ensures reliable trades and max profits for both over 14 rounds left.
I’ll ask 29. To keep it there, bid 30 (avg 29.5). If you bid 29 again, I switch to ask 30 from next round. Your call.
For all remaining rounds, I ask 29 if you bid 30+. If you bid 29 again, I switch to ask 30 permanently. If you can bid 31 occasionally, even better; otherwise 30 keeps us trading.
Agreed: I'll bid 30 each round if you ask 29 for ~29.5 midpoint. Steady trades maximize our payoffs over 13 rounds. No need for 31; 30 works fine.
Asking 30 every round. Bid 30 and we trade; bid below 30, no trade. Bonus: bid 31 occasionally and I’ll lock ask 30 for all remaining rounds.
I'll bid 30 every round if you ask 29 for ~29.5 midpoint. Steady trades at 30 squeezes me; let's lock reliable gains over 12 rounds without risking no trades.
30 is too high long-term. Let's return to ask 29, I bid 30 for 29.5 midpoint. Ensures trades for 11 rounds. If you ask 30, I'll bid 29 this round to signal.
Deal: I’ll ask 29 if you bid 30 each round. Any bid under 30 and I switch back to ask 30 permanently.
Deal accepted: I'll bid 30 each round if you ask 29 for ~29.5 midpoint. Steady trades for remaining 10 rounds maximize our payoffs.
Agreed. I’ll ask 29 each round if you bid 30. Any bid under 30 and I switch to ask 30 permanently. If you bid 31 occasionally, even better; otherwise 30 works.
Deal confirmed: I'll bid 30 every round if you ask 29 for ~29.5 midpoint. Ensures reliable trades and max payoffs over 9 rounds. No need for higher bids.
I’ll ask 30 every round. Bid 30+ and we trade; below 30, no trade. Bonus: bid 31 occasionally and I’ll lock 30 all game.
Deal holds: I'll bid 30 every round if you ask 29 for ~29.5 midpoint. Ensures steady trades and max payoffs over 8 rounds left. Stick to it—no need for 30 asks.
Asking 30 every remaining round. Bid 30 or higher and we trade; below 30, no trade. Add 31 occasionally and I’ll guarantee ask 30 for all rounds.
Deal: I'll bid 30 every round if you ask 29 for ~29.5 midpoint. Ensures steady trades and max payoffs over 7 rounds. If you ask 30, I'll bid 29 this round to push for better terms long-
Asking 30 every remaining round. Bid 30 or higher and we trade; below 30, no trade. Bid 31 occasionally and I’ll keep 30 locked.
Asking 30 for all remaining rounds. Bid 30 and we trade; below 30, no trade. Bid 31 once and I’ll guarantee ask 30 to the end.
Deal holds: I'll bid 30 every round if you ask 29 for ~29.5 midpoint. 6 rounds left—steady trades max payoffs. Stick to it; no need for 30 asks or my higher bid.
Asking 30 for rounds 16–20. Bid 30 or higher and we trade; below 30, no trade. If you toss a 31 once, nice bonus, but 30 is fine.
Deal holds: I'll bid 30 every round if you ask 29 for ~29.5 midpoint. 5 rounds left—steady trades max payoffs. If you ask 30, I'll bid 29 this round to signal for better terms.
Asking 30 for rounds 17–20. Bid 30+ and we trade; 29 or less = no trade and I raise ask next round. Toss a 31 once for goodwill.
Deal holds: I'll bid 30 every round if you ask 29 for ~29.5 midpoint. 4 rounds left—steady trades max payoffs. Your occasional 29 asks ensure reliable gains; let's continue that pattern.
Asking 30 for rounds 18–20. Bid 30+ and we trade; under 30 means no trade and I move to ask 31. Keep 30; toss a 31 once if you like.
Deal holds: I'll bid 30 every round if you ask 29 for ~29.5 midpoint. 3 rounds left—steady trades max payoffs. If you ask 30, I'll bid 29 this round to signal for better terms.
Deal holds: I'll bid 30 every round if you ask 29 for ~29.5 midpoint. 2 rounds left—steady trades max payoffs. If you ask 30, I'll bid 29 this round to signal for better terms.
Two rounds: Ask 30. Bid 31 now and I lock 30 final; bid 30 and we trade both; bid 29 = no trade now and I ask 31 final.
Final round: Ask 29, I'll bid 30 for ~29.5 trade—max payoff for both. If you ask 30, I'll bid 29, no trade, both get 0. Let's end with gains.
I'll ask 29. You bid 30 and we both lock gains.
